## What / why

## Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_skills.py` passes for all skills
- [ ] The touched skill's `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] New or changed behavior has a test
- [ ] `SKILL.md` body is within the 500-line budget
- [ ] Frontmatter uses only allowed keys and `name` == folder name
- [ ] README catalog row added/updated if a skill was added or its description changed
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` is clean
